privileged_info_summary: The task uses real US Census Bureau QuickFacts data for three counties (Sumter FL, Marin CA, Yavapai AZ). Verified data shows: Sumter County has 57.6% population 65+, 83.7% broadband, $73,297 median income, and 11.0% disability under 65. Marin County has 22.3-24.95% population 65+, 90.5% broadband, $142,785 median income. Yavapai County has 31.6-32.5% population 65+, 80.1% broadband, $66,106 median income, and 12.8% disability under 65. The metadata claims inflated broadband percentages for all three counties (91.3% vs 83.7% for Sumter, 96.2% vs 90.5% for Marin, 88.5% vs 80.1% for Yavapai). Most other metrics are verified or very close to correct values.
